description.default: Employee-facing HB Kudos recognition surface — featured spotlight, recent recognition rail, typed-recipient submission (individual/team/department/project group), archive browse with configurable age-off (homepageAgeOffDays property, default 14 days), role-safe detail panel, celebrate interaction, and submitter withdraw/resubmit flows. Placement intent: zone-aligned homepage composition; authored to read as a premium editorial card inside SharePoint section columns (1/1, 1/2, 1/3, 1/4). Intentionally NOT full-bleed — the public surface composes alongside sibling homepage webparts and its inner rhythm is tuned for standard section-column widths.
